title: Lexend Font Continued
description: Changes the characters to the Lexend Font.
body:
# Requires [Caxton](https://modrinth.com/mod/caxton) in order to do anything

Changes the default Minecraft font to Lexend, famous for being easy to read.
Credits and licenses are found in the RP's folder.

To clear up any misunderstandings, I created the original "Lexend Font" resource pack, and released it under another account because my Google-linked account's email address was permanently deleted by Google. The fonts are not owned by me.
